text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 6.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #7a8599
font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #0b142a

g.text: Who asks what, and where the answer lives

text.style: font-size: 7.4px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #445066

g.text: One filter row scopes every panel on a page, so no two charts ever disagree

path.style: fill: none; stroke: #1e6fd9; stroke-width: 1.2; stroke-linecap: round
fill: none; stroke: #1e6fd9; stroke-width: 1.2; stroke-linecap: round
fill: none; stroke: #1e6fd9; stroke-width: 1.2; stroke-linecap: round
fill: none; stroke: #1e6fd9; stroke-width: 1.2; stroke-linecap: round
fill: none; stroke: #c23333; stroke-width: 0.9; stroke-linecap: round
fill: none; stroke: #5b4bc4; stroke-width: 0.9; stroke-linecap: round
fill: none; stroke: #119b8a; stroke-width: 0.9; stroke-linecap: round
fill: none; stroke: #c98500; stroke-width: 0.9; stroke-linecap: round
fill: none; stroke: #0c7a3e; stroke-width: 0.9; stroke-linecap: round

text.style: font-size: 6.8px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #445066

g.text: — Every chart has a table-view twin with a CSV download, so no value is reachable only through a tooltip.

text.style: font-size: 6.8px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #445066

g.text: — Status is carried by an icon and a label as well as colour. Colour follows the entity, never its rank.

text.style: font-size: 6.8px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #445066

g.text: — No dual-axis charts: two measures of different scale are indexed to 100 at t0 on one axis.

text.style: font-size: 6.8px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #445066

g.text: — The AI Copilot answers in outcome terms and cites the tool each figure came from.

text.style: font-size: 6px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #7a8599

g.text: Personas and their expectations are the FinOps Foundation's, rendered from the same constants the code uses.
